notable_prs.title: Refactor auth middleware to async pipeline
notable_prs.description: Complete rewrite of auth middleware from synchronous chain to async pipeline. Reduced p95 latency from 820ms to 340ms.

notable_prs.description: New rate limiting system using Redis sliding window.

notable_prs.title: Quick fix: patch user lookup for null emails
notable_prs.description: Hotfix for prod issue — users with null emails were crashing the lookup service.
quality_signals: minimal fix but no guard at API boundary

review_samples.comment: This cache invalidation logic will break if two requests hit the same key within the TTL window. Consider using a lock or check-and-set pattern.
Nice work on the error handling! One suggestion: extract the validation into a separate function so you can reuse it in the batch endpoint.

Reduce tech debt in payments module

anthropic_usage.quality_note: Uses Claude for high-leverage tasks — architecture and debugging, not just autocomplete.

name: Sofia Torres

notable_prs.description: Email verification with clean separation of concerns.

review_samples.comment: I tested this on the notification preferences page and the contrast ratio on the muted text drops below WCAG AA. Here's a fix: change text-gray-500 to text-gray-400 on line 47.

anthropic_usage.quality_note: Highest AI adoption on the team. Uses Claude to accelerate learning — asks it to explain senior engineers' code, generates tests to understand edge cases.

verdict_tagline: Fastest growth trajectory on the team.

review_samples.comment: This works, but the retry logic is buried inside the handler. If we extract it into a withRetry() wrapper, we can reuse it. Want me to pair on this?
